motion_controller._baudrate_note: Common printer baud rates: Monoprice/Creality=115200, older RepRap=250000, Prusa=115200
motion_controller._movement_wait_timeout_note: Seconds to wait for M400 (move complete) acknowledgement. Increase if you get timeout errors on long moves across the full plate.

gpio_controller._enabled_note: Set to true only when an Arduino or GPIO device is physically connected. When false, laser and GPIO commands are silently ignored.
gpio_controller._baudrate_note: Baud rate must match the value set in the Arduino sketch (default 9600).
gpio_controller._laser_pin_note: The Arduino digital pin number connected to the laser module.

simulation._note: Set any device to true to run it in simulation mode without physical hardware. GPIO simulation is separate from gpio_controller.enabled.
